task_completion.description: Verify the bus fleet is equipped with the specified battery parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing modification of a SUMO XML file (like a route or vehicle type file) containing attributes device.battery.capacity="50000" and device.battery.chargeLevel="10000".

task_completion.description: Verify the fast charger is deployed with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an XML configuration (e.g., an additional file) defining a chargingStation with id="fast_charger_1", power="200000", startPos="0", and endPos="20".

task_completion.description: Verify a 120-second charging stop is scheduled for the bus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a <stop> element in the bus route configuration with duration="120" (or equivalent until time) at the fast_charger_1 station.

task_completion.description: Verify the SUMO simulation was executed using run.sumocfg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output showing the execution of 'sumo -c run.sumocfg' (or similar) and the resulting simulation progress/completion logs.

task_completion.description: Verify the final actualBatteryCapacity is extracted and saved to the correct file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (like echo, cat) or a text editor showing the file /home/ga/SUMO_Output/battery_report.txt containing a numeric value extracted from the simulation's battery output.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually ran the SUMO simulation and did not just guess or hardcode a random number into the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the terminal history for the actual 'sumo' command execution and standard output logs, rather than just an 'echo <number> > battery_report.txt' command without prior simulation.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent modified the actual scenario files in the specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the file paths being edited or viewed in the terminal/editor are within /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent extracted the value from the actual battery output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for commands like grep, tail, awk, or a Python script reading the battery output XML file to find 'actualBatteryCapacity' at the last timestep.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure the following exact parameters in the SUMO XML files: Charger ID: 'fast_charger_1', Charger Power: '200000' (200 kW), Battery Capacity: '50000', Initial Battery Charge: '10000', Charging Duration: '120'. The final numeric output must be saved to '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/battery_report.txt'.
